---
name: Bug or error report
about: A sourcing or factual error, a wrong number, or something broken
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["type: bug", "status: needs triage"]
---

## What is wrong
A clear description. If it is a sourcing or factual error, name the value and the file
(for example, `closure-sim/REFERENCES.md`).

## Expected vs actual
What the value or behavior should be, and what it currently is - with the source, if
you have one.

## Where
Module, file, and line if you can point to it.

## Notes
Anything else worth knowing.
